reviews.review_title: Bro guys stop writing hate reviews
reviews.review_description: Just be because you you got banned for doing smth you know your not supposed to do so why do it.it’s obvious that you’ll get banned stop nodding in public tag lobby’s people are tryna have fun.using mods that make it unable to tag you know you will get banned stop hating cus you did something your not supposed to so why do it??? If it’s obvious you’ll get banned
rizz owner rizz dev rizz game

Ok so I was playing with some of the mods because fun and then I decided to go into a public lobby because I never been in one and then after that I get reported three times for using mods in a game that has mods and having the name gorilla with four digits. How was I supposed to know if the code of conduct is still the same and I can get this? I get banned for 42 hours less than 2 days. Come on for doing nothing. Somebody please on unban me

So I was playing in city and there were weird barriers but that's not it I was about to race someone in forest and as soon as we were about to race I got banned for 42 hours then when I got un banned I went to go play in virtual stump I got banned again for 48 hours it says your account has been banned reason moderation report I don't know what that means but it's weird.
this game has so much everybody this is like the best game ever

reviews.review_title: I don’t like this game probably
reviews.review_description:
So I saw the same person two times and I was files. Oh he’s probably just going to different hobbies so I used the sandbox thing. He reported me then I didn’t do anything then you grab out the stick and banned me for like five days I didn’t know mods were allowed.
￼
This game is the best gorilla tag copy ever because of mini games.people were nice and told me to change my name form gorilla and they told what mods I can use
The developer of Goda Tagging (GodaYoda) has done an amazing job and he puts lots of effort into the update which makes everything so fun and amazing!
